hooks.command: sh -c 'if command -v entire >/dev/null 2>&1; then E=entire; else R=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null); if [ -f "$R/entire.exe" ]; then E="$R/entire.exe"; elif [ -f "$R/entire" ]; then E="$R/entire"; else exit 0; fi; fi; exec $E hooks claude-code post-task'

sh -c 'if command -v entire >/dev/null 2>&1; then E=entire; else R=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null); if [ -f "$R/entire.exe" ]; then E="$R/entire.exe"; elif [ -f "$R/entire" ]; then E="$R/entire"; else exit 0; fi; fi; exec $E hooks claude-code post-todo'

sh -c 'if command -v entire >/dev/null 2>&1; then E=entire; else R=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null); if [ -f "$R/entire.exe" ]; then E="$R/entire.exe"; elif [ -f "$R/entire" ]; then E="$R/entire"; else exit 0; fi; fi; exec $E hooks claude-code pre-task'

sh -c 'if command -v entire >/dev/null 2>&1; then E=entire; else R=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null); if [ -f "$R/entire.exe" ]; then E="$R/entire.exe"; elif [ -f "$R/entire" ]; then E="$R/entire"; else exit 0; fi; fi; exec $E hooks claude-code session-end'

sh -c 'if command -v entire >/dev/null 2>&1; then E=entire; else R=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null); if [ -f "$R/entire.exe" ]; then E="$R/entire.exe"; elif [ -f "$R/entire" ]; then E="$R/entire"; else printf "%s\n" "{\"systemMessage\":\"\\n\\nEntire CLI is enabled but not installed or not on PATH.\\nInstallation guide: https://docs.entire.io/cli/installation#installation-methods\"}"; exit 0; fi; fi; exec $E hooks claude-code session-start'

sh -c 'if command -v entire >/dev/null 2>&1; then E=entire; else R=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null); if [ -f "$R/entire.exe" ]; then E="$R/entire.exe"; elif [ -f "$R/entire" ]; then E="$R/entire"; else exit 0; fi; fi; exec $E hooks claude-code stop'

sh -c 'if command -v entire >/dev/null 2>&1; then E=entire; else R=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null); if [ -f "$R/entire.exe" ]; then E="$R/entire.exe"; elif [ -f "$R/entire" ]; then E="$R/entire"; else exit 0; fi; fi; exec $E hooks claude-code user-prompt-submit'
